backlog.desc: Find easiest way for user testing access

backlog.title: Build Session Notes Transcriber App
backlog.desc: Voice transcribe session notes → Notion integration. Records session, transcribes to text, formats as proper session notes, saves to Notion database

intel.title: NDIS New Framework Planning Consultation Closes March 6 (48 HOURS)
intel.summary: NDIS public consultation on new planning framework closes Friday, March 6, 2026 (2 days). Changes rolling mid-2026: extended plan durations, new assessment process. Critical for Paul's NDIS review timing—understand framework implications now before changes take effect.

intel.title: Loop11 Remote Testing: Zero-Install Plugin for Report Writer Beta Launch
intel.summary: Loop11 identified as best-in-class remote testing tool for 2026: zero browser extension required, full screen reader + assistive tech support, fastest participant onboarding. Competitors (Userlytics, BrowserStack) require more setup. Loop11 supports both moderated & unmoderated testing. Ready to deploy for Report Writer beta with disabled user cohorts.

intel.title: Qwen 3.5 Performance Confirmed: Parity with Claude/GPT-4 at Lower Cost
intel.summary: Alibaba's Qwen 3.5 (released Feb 2026) officially validates performance parity with OpenAI & Anthropic models in benchmarks. Optimized for agentic AI workflows. Qwen3.5:35b instance running locally at 192.168.1.174:11434 ready for production. Cost advantage significant for ongoing Report Writer review & refinement tasks.

intel.title: ASX/NASDAQ/S&P 500 Market Snapshot Friday March 6, 2026
intel.summary: S&P/ASX 200 +0.44% (8,940.3); NASDAQ likely up 0.65%+ on strong tech rebound; US markets resilient. No major volatility flags. Stable conditions for any investment/timing decisions.

intel.title: IBM + AMD Quantum Computing Integration: Frontier vs Efficient Model Era (2026)
intel.summary: 2026 marked as 'year of frontier versus efficient model classes': IBM & AMD exploring quantum-HPC integration for next-generation algorithms. Efficient models (like Qwen 3.5) competing against frontier models (GPT-4, Claude Opus) in practical workloads. Trend confirms local efficient models (Qwen 3.5:35b) viable long-term for Paul's infrastructure.

intel.title: NDIS Evidence of Disability: Updated 2026 Requirements & Support Letter Guidelines
intel.summary: Official NDIS guidance on providing evidence of disability (2026): requires documented assessment from treating professionals (doctor, OT, exercise physiologist, psychologist). No formal template required—informal support letters work. APM blog outlines best practices for explaining daily support needs & impact on carers. PWD WA toolkit available. For NDIS review: gather letters from all treating professionals now.

intel.title: NDIS Exercise Physiology Services: In-Home & Telehealth Options Now Widespread
intel.summary: NDIS exercise physiology market expanded (2026): Ability Action Australia, Active Ability, PhysioInq all offer mobile in-home & telehealth services. All providers ESSA-accredited. PhysioInq explicitly supports wheelchair users & remote consultation. Exercise training shows benefits for SCI autonomic control (Hansen et al., J Appl Physiol 2026). For Paul's NDIS plan: consider exercise physiology as funded support for cardiovascular health management.

intel.title: Qwen 3.5 Released: Alibaba's Agentic AI (Feb 2026) — Performance Parity with US Leaders
intel.summary: Alibaba released Qwen 3.5 (Feb 2026) designed for agentic AI era—claims performance parity with major US models, improved cost efficiency. Qwen3-Coder-Next available for local coding agents. More open-weight models expected. Relevant for Paul's Report Writer: local qwen3.5:35b instance (192.168.1.174:11434) already deployed & competitive. Ready for production review agents.

intel.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro + DeepMind Evolutionary Algorithm = Breakthrough Agentic AI (Jan 2026)
intel.summary: Google DeepMind combined Gemini 3.1 Pro (1M-token context) with evolutionary algorithms that check, pick best suggestions, and feed back to LLM for iterative improvement. 77.1% on ARC-AGI-2 benchmark. Multimodal across text, images, audio, video, code. For Paul's Report Writer: consider agentic loop architecture for iterative refinement.

intel.title: Exercise Training on Autonomic Control in SCI: New 2026 Journal Review Published
intel.summary: Journal of Applied Physiology (Feb 2026): systematic review of exercise training effects on autonomic cardiovascular control in SCI individuals. Key finding: regular exercise mitigates autonomic dysfunction common in quadriplegia. Researchers: Hansen, Williamson, Larsen, Ravn. Useful for Paul's physiotherapy planning—confirms exercise benefits for cardio health.
